calendar.matters:
By Fax Petition For Determination Under Probate Code Section 21320, Et Seq.
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for petitioner. Brett Pedersen appearing for David Barbaria. Mr. Barbaria is deceased. This petition is withdrawn. Mr. Pedersen does not object. Counsel have submitted a stipulation and order to releasing funds to successor trustee. Since Mr. Barbaris is deceased, the order is not appropriate. Court wants an exparte petition to release funds. The declaratory relief petition is off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
